industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Rotem Energy Mineral (REM) - Limited Partnership
summary: Rotem Energy Mineral (REM) - Limited Partnership engages in the search, development, and production of energy oil shale in Israel. It also focuses on the production of electricity from oil shale and plastic waste in the Mishor Rotem area. Northwood Exploration Israel Ltd. operates as a general partner of Rotem Energy Mineral (REM) - Limited Partnership. The company was founded in 2016 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
